name: Crusty Roast Lamb (Uaineoil Faoi Chrusta) (Irish)
recipeIngredient: 1 Large cooking apple, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes, apples, and core the apple.
2. Rub the lamb with breadcrumbs mixed with herbs, butter, salt, and pepper, cutting criss-cross slits around the top.
3. Place vegetables and apple in the roasting pan, mixing with seasoning.
4. Add the joint of lamb on top, then pour chicken stock into the pan without covering the meat.
5. Cover loosely with foil and bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
6. Lower heat to 350°F and cook an additional 20-25 minutes until desired doneness is reached.
7. Remove foil for the last half hour and check vegetables are nearly cooked.
8. Finish cooking without foil to allow top to brown and crusty.
